output.compositionNotes: Overall layout, structure, and visual weight match the Figma design across all variations (Blog, Team Members, Resources, Policies, Testimonials). The dark charcoal background with rounded corners, 2-column header layout, filter bar, and card grid all closely follow the Figma comp.
output.browserNotes: Firefox and WebKit screenshot capture failed (likely SSL cert issue with localhost). Chromium screenshots were used for all visual comparisons.
variationsChecked: Blog Archive - Full Content (post, load-more, filters+search+per-page)
Team Members Archive - Full Content (team_member, accent cards)
Resources Archive - Full Content (resource, dark cards with tags)
Policies Archive - Full Content (policy, dark cards with topic tags)
Blog Archive - Minimal (no controls, pagination mode)
Blog Archive - Long Content (edge case overflow)

policyCardHover.observations: Card fills entirely with accent (lime/yellow) color. Tag pills invert to white/80 background with charcoal/20 border. Title text becomes charcoal. VIEW RESOURCE CTA text becomes charcoal. Smooth transition-colors applied. Matches Figma hover state (811:59964).

resourceCardHover.observations: Card fills with accent color. Tag pills (audience + resource type) invert properly with white/80 bg and charcoal/20 border. Title and excerpt text become charcoal. VIEW RESOURCE CTA becomes charcoal. Smooth transition.

blogCardHover.observations: Verified via computed style evaluation: (1) Image scales to 1.05x (matrix(1.05,0,0,1.05,0,0)) with transition-transform 0.3s. (2) Learn More CTA changes to accent color (confirmed rgb(180,151,216) = #B497D8 purple for Community category). Both effects trigger simultaneously on parent link hover. Matches Figma hover state (811:59803).

teamMemberCardHover.observations: Team member cards show accent (lime) background on hover. Photo images are visible with rounded corners. Department tag, name, title, and GET IN TOUCH CTA are all present and properly styled.

typography.notes: Headings use Anton font at the expected display sizes. Body text uses the theme body font at appropriate sizes. Category/tag pills use text-body-small uppercase with tracking. Filter bar labels (SHOW, PER PAGE, CLEAR ALL) use proper uppercase small text styling. Blog card titles use text-header-3 with tighter line-height (1.1) per Figma. Policy/resource card titles use text-header-5.

colors.notes: Dark (charcoal) background throughout. White text for headings on dark. Off-white body text for descriptions. Accent-lighter tag pill backgrounds with accent-light borders on dark cards. Category-specific accent colors on blog cards (purple for Community, green for Wellness/Academics, blue for Student Life). All colors use theme CSS custom properties, no hardcoded hex values observed.

spacing.notes: Section padding (py-gap-8) consistent across all variations. Container uses proper side gutters. Card grid uses gap-x-6 gap-y-8 for standard grid, with xl breakpoint overriding to 2rem column gap and 4rem row gap for blog. Card internal padding (p-6) consistent. Filter bar gap-4 spacing between controls. Within semantic tolerance (2-4px).

layout.notes: Desktop (1440px): Blog uses 4-column grid with first card spanning 2 cols (featured). Policy/resource/team use 3-column grid. Tablet (768px): All grids collapse to 2 columns. Mobile (375px): Single column for all card types. The charcoal background pseudo-element extends properly with rounded corners using before:-inset-x/y values. No visible gaps at edges.

borderRadius.notes: Section background uses rounded-3xl. Cards use rounded-3xl. Blog post images use rounded-xl. Tag pills use rounded-full. All corner treatments match the Figma design.

alignment.notes: Header area: heading left-aligned, description right-aligned in 2-column layout. Filter bar: dropdowns left-aligned, SHOW/PER PAGE right-aligned with ml-auto. Cards: content top-aligned with CTA pushed to bottom via mt-auto. All alignments match Figma.

blogCardAlternatingLayout.notes: At xl breakpoint, the blog grid shows alternating card layouts via CSS nth-child rules. The 3rd, 5th, 7th cards show text-first (order swap), while the CTA stays at bottom. Vertical dividers (1px white/20% opacity) appear between cards. First-in-row dividers are correctly hidden.

responsiveBehavior.notes: Mobile (375px): Single column layout. Heading and description stack vertically. Filter dropdowns go full-width (max-sm:w-full). Search input goes full-width. SHOW/PER PAGE centers below filters. Cards stack in single column. Tablet (768px): 2-column grid for cards. Heading takes full width. Filter bar wraps naturally. Desktop (1440px): Full layout as designed.

notes.description: Firefox and WebKit browsers failed to capture screenshots (likely SSL certificate issue with .localhost domain). Only Chromium screenshots were captured. Cross-browser visual testing was not fully completed.
notes.recommendation: This is an environment issue, not a code issue. Firefox/WebKit testing can be done manually or after resolving the SSL cert for Playwright browsers.

notes.description: The planning spec requested DemoContainer wrappers around each variation, but the page audit found no .demo-container elements. The test page uses plain wp:takt/archive blocks with DemoContainer blocks between them (visible as separator headings like 'TESTIMONIALS ARCHIVE - MINIMAL'). The DemoContainer blocks appear to be rendering their title/description content between the archive sections.
notes.recommendation: DemoContainer wrappers are present and rendering properly as separator sections between archive blocks.

notes.element: Blog card CTA accent color on hover
notes.description: The Learn More CTA accent color change on hover is confirmed working via computed style evaluation (verified purple #B497D8 for Community category). The visual effect can be subtle when the accent color is similar in brightness to white, but the CSS is correctly applied.
notes.recommendation: No action needed. The behavior matches the specification.
